_contextSnippet: Capmatinib significantly inhibited growth in the NF1-MET tumorgrafts even at the low dose of 3 mg/kg (p < 0.0001), suggesting these tumors are highly MET-dependent. Increasing the dose to 30 mg/kg produced a significant reduction and decreased tumor growth rate by 55 mm³
resourceName: Nf1 fl/KO ; lox-stop-loxMET tg/+ ; Plp - creERT tg/+
details: NF1-MET tumorgrafts showed exquisite sensitivity to capmatinib even at low dose of 3 mg/kg (p < 0.0001), with 55 mm³ decreased tumor growth rate at 30 mg/kg
